name: sevdesk
description: Manage contacts, invoices, vouchers, and receipt uploads in sevdesk bookkeeping

envVars.name: SEVDESK_API_KEY
envVars.description: sevdesk API token (32-character hexadecimal string), found in your sevdesk user settings. Sent raw in the Authorization header without a prefix.

tools.name: List Contacts
tools.description: List sevdesk contacts (organizations and persons), e.g. to find a contact id before creating an invoice

depth.description: '0' returns only organizations, '1' returns organizations and persons

customerNumber.description: Only contacts with this customer number

tools.name: List Invoices
tools.description: List sevdesk invoices with optional status, number, date, and contact filters

status.description: Invoice status code filter; the API accepts 100 draft, 200 open/due, or 1000 paid (other model statuses such as 50 and 750 are not valid filter values)

invoiceNumber.description: Only invoices with this invoice number

startDate.description: Only invoices with a date equal or higher (Unix timestamp)

endDate.description: Only invoices with a date equal or lower (Unix timestamp)

contact[id].description: Only invoices for this contact id; must be combined with contact[objectName]

contact[objectName].description: Required when contact[id] is set; use the value 'Contact'

tools.name: Get Invoice
tools.description: Retrieve a single sevdesk invoice by its id

invoiceId.description: ID of the invoice to return

tools.name: Create Invoice
tools.description: Create a sevdesk invoice with positions via the saveInvoice factory endpoint; create with status 100 for an editable draft

invoice.description: Invoice model. Required fields: objectName 'Invoice', mapAll true, contact ({ id, objectName: 'Contact' }), invoiceDate, status ('100' for draft), invoiceType ('RE'), currency ('EUR'), taxRate, taxRule ({ id, objectName: 'TaxRule' }), taxText, discount (0), addressCountry ({ id, objectName: 'StaticCountry' }), contactPerson ({ id, objectName: 'SevUser' }).

invoicePosSave.description: Invoice positions to create, each with objectName 'InvoicePos', mapAll true, name, quantity, price, taxRate, and unity ({ id, objectName: 'Unity' })

invoicePosDelete.description: Positions to delete when updating an existing invoice; null on create

discountSave.description: Optional discounts to apply, each with objectName 'Discounts' and mapAll true

filename.description: Filename of a previously uploaded file to attach to the invoice

takeDefaultAddress.description: Use the contact's default address for the invoice address

tools.name: Upload Voucher File
tools.description: Upload a receipt or invoice file to sevdesk; returns an internal filename that can be attached when creating a voucher

file.description: Base64-encoded content of the file to upload, sent decoded as the binary multipart 'file' part

file_name.description: Filename for the uploaded file, e.g. receipt.pdf

tools.name: List Vouchers
tools.description: List sevdesk accounting vouchers (receipts) with optional status, type, date, and description filters

status.description: Voucher status code: 50 draft, 100 unpaid/due, 1000 paid

creditDebit.description: 'C' for credit vouchers only, 'D' for debit vouchers only

descriptionLike.description: Only vouchers with a description like this

startDate.description: Only vouchers with a date equal or higher (Unix timestamp)

endDate.description: Only vouchers with a date equal or lower (Unix timestamp)

tools.name: Create Voucher
tools.description: Create a bookable voucher (receipt) with positions via the saveVoucher factory endpoint — the step that turns a file staged with Upload Voucher File into an actual accounting record

voucher.description: Voucher model. Required fields: objectName 'Voucher', mapAll true, status (50 draft, 100 unpaid, 1000 paid), creditDebit ('C' credit or 'D' debit), voucherType ('VOU' normal or 'RV' recurring), taxRule ({ id, objectName: 'TaxRule' }, sevdesk-Update 2.0) or legacy taxType. Recommended: voucherDate, supplier ({ id, objectName: 'Contact' }) or supplierName, description (voucher number).

voucherPosSave.description: Voucher positions to create, each with objectName 'VoucherPos', mapAll true, accountingType ({ id, objectName: 'AccountingType' }) or accountDatev, taxRate, net (boolean), sumNet, and sumGross

voucherPosDelete.description: Positions to delete when updating an existing voucher; null on create

filename.description: Internal filename returned by Upload Voucher File to attach the uploaded document to this voucher

tools.name: Get Invoice PDF
tools.description: Retrieve the rendered PDF document of an invoice for sending or archiving

download.description: Return the PDF as a download

preventSendBy.description: Do not mark the invoice as sent when fetching the PDF

tools.name: Book Invoice Amount
tools.description: Register a (partial) payment on an invoice and mark it paid when settled — closes the reconciliation loop after money arrives

invoiceId.description: Invoice id to book the amount on

amount.description: Amount to book; can be a partial amount

date.description: Booking date as Unix timestamp (most likely the payment date)

type.description: Booking type: FULL_PAYMENT (normal), N (partial), CB (discount/skonto), O (other reduction/increase), OF (reminder charges), MTC (monetary traffic costs)

checkAccount.description: Check account the payment was received on: { "id": <checkAccountId>, "objectName": "CheckAccount" }

prompts.title: Open invoices
prompts.prompt: List my open sevdesk invoices and summarize who owes what.

prompts.title: File a receipt
prompts.prompt: Upload this receipt to sevdesk so it can be booked as a voucher.

prompts.title: Draft an invoice
prompts.prompt: Create a draft invoice in sevdesk for a customer; ask me for the positions first.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: sevdesk setup

steps.title: Create a sevdesk account
steps.description: Sign up at https://sevdesk.de — a free trial account works for testing the API; there is no separate sandbox environment.

steps.title: Find your API token
steps.description: Log in to https://my.sevdesk.de and open Settings > Users. Every administrator has one API token, a 32-character hexadecimal string. Copy it and set it as SEVDESK_API_KEY.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: The token is sent as the raw value of the Authorization header on every request (no 'Bearer' prefix). Test with: curl https://my.sevdesk.de/api/v1/Contact -H "Authorization: <token>".

notes: sevdesk API tokens have an infinite lifetime and grant the full permissions of the user they belong to; rotate them from the user settings if leaked.
The REST base URL is https://my.sevdesk.de/api/v1 (the docs are hosted at api.sevdesk.de).
List responses wrap results in an 'objects' array; pagination uses limit and offset query parameters.
The saveInvoice and saveVoucher factory endpoints require fully specified models: every embedded object needs objectName and mapAll fields, and references use { id, objectName } pairs.
Voucher/Factory/uploadTempFile is a multipart/form-data upload; the returned internal filename is referenced in the 'filename' field when saving an invoice or voucher.
